import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Paradox Unit Ranking: Ultimate Tier List & Guide 2026",
  description: "Discover the ultimate Anime Paradox unit ranking for 2026! Our comprehensive tier list covers the best DPS, Support, and Farm units to dominate every stage.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/8B5CF6/fff?text=Anime+Paradox+Unit+Ranking",
  date: "2026-02-01",
  author: "Anime Paradox Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Anime Paradox unit ranking**: **Storrk** and **Zid** are the top-tier DPS, offering unparalleled damage and utility.
- **Sun Jin Wu** and **Igrus** form a powerful synergy, excelling in long-duration game modes with massive scaling.
- **Broly** is the best Mythic, known for infinite damage stacking in raid and infinite modes.
- **Bulma** is the essential farm unit, crucial for a strong early economy.
- **Oroheme** and **Idol** are top supports, providing critical healing and damage buffs to your team.
- Prioritize units with **AOE damage** and **stacking passives** for late-game success.
</Callout>

Welcome, commanders, to the definitive **Anime Paradox unit ranking** for 2026! As the meta constantly evolves, understanding which units truly shine can be the difference between victory and defeat. Whether you're a new player looking for the best starters or a veteran aiming to optimize your endgame squad, this guide provides an in-depth look at every crucial unit. We'll break down the top-tier DPS, essential supports, and must-have farm units, ensuring you're equipped with the knowledge to build an unstoppable team. Get ready to master the battlefield and conquer every challenge Anime Paradox throws your way with our expert **anime paradox unit ranking** insights.

<Section icon={Swords} title="Understanding the Anime Paradox Unit Ranking System">
Before diving into the specifics, it's crucial to understand how units are categorized and ranked in Anime Paradox. Units generally fall into four main roles: **Attackers** (DPS), **Defenders** (Tanks), **Supports** (Healers/Buffers), and **Farms** (Economy). Our tier list considers overall utility, damage output, survivability, cost efficiency, and synergy with other units. Paradox and Secret rarity units often occupy the highest tiers due to their unique abilities and superior base stats.

**Video Highlights:**
- Explains the four main unit categories: Attackers, Defenders, Support, and Farms.
- Highlights **Stark** (Coyote) as the current best unit due to abysmal damage and nuke ability.
- Mentions **Sun Jin Wu** as a top-tier unit, especially with **Igris** synergy.
- Identifies **Kilawa** as the best attacker for fast attacks and teleportation.
- Discusses **Igris** as the best defender with high HP and damage reduction.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="patRU0Bzecw" title="Ranking EVERY UNIT in Anime Paradox Release! (META Tier List)" />

The game's economy is quite generous, meaning that hyper cost-efficiency isn't always the primary concern, especially if you bring a strong farm unit like Bulma. Instead, focus on units that offer significant impact through damage, utility, or survivability, allowing you to maximize your team's potential by later waves.

<Callout type="tip" title="Tier List Philosophy">
Our **Anime Paradox unit ranking** prioritizes units that offer strong late-game scaling, map-wide impact, and crucial team utility. While early-game performance is considered, long-term viability and synergy are key for tackling the toughest challenges in 2026.
</Callout>
</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="S+ & S-Tier DPS Units: The Apex Predators">
The S+ and S-Tier units represent the pinnacle of damage dealing in Anime Paradox. These units boast incredible damage, unique abilities, and often provide map-wide coverage or unparalleled scaling, making them essential for high-level content and dominating the **anime paradox unit ranking**.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Storrk (Resurreccion)">
    - **Best in Game**: Unmatched health, damage, and range.
    - **Map-wide impact**: Chases all enemies, Metralleta nuke.
    - **Rare**: 0.001% chance, but worth the investment.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Zid (Atomic)">
    - **Top Secret**: Full-map AOE once upgraded.
    - **Tanky DPS**: Massive damage and high survivability.
    - **Investment**: Requires heavy investment but provides immense payoff.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Sun Jin Wu (Monarch)">
    - **Infinite Scaling**: Gains permanent buffs on kills.
    - **Igrus Synergy**: Stacks twice as fast with Igrus.
    - **Execute**: Non-boss enemies below 5% HP (up to 80% with stacks).
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

These units form the backbone of any top-tier team, providing the raw power needed to clear waves and take down bosses. Their abilities often simplify challenging stages, allowing for smoother progression.

### Top-Tier DPS Unit Breakdown

| Unit Name              | Rarity   | Key Strengths                                    | Weaknesses / Notes                                                                                                                                                                             | Best Use Cases                                        |
| :--------------------- | :------- | :----------------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :---------------------------------------------------- |
| **Storrk (Resurreccion)** | Paradox  | Absurd health, damage, range; Metralleta nuke    | Extremely rare (0.001%), high cost to max                                                                                                                                                | All endgame content, bossing, wave clear              |
| **Zid (Atomic)**       | Secret   | Full-map AOE, massive tankiness, high damage     | Heavy investment required, not necessary for early content                                                                                                                             | All endgame content, infinite mode, raid bossing      |
| **Sun Jin Wu (Monarch)** | Secret   | Insane on-kill scaling, executes enemies, Igrus synergy | Needs time to scale, performs best with **Igrus**, requires "Internal" trait for 1-placement                                                                                                 | Infinite mode, raids, long stages                     |
| **Igrus (Elite Knight)** | Secret   | Damage buff on-kill (100% max), self-heal, bleed | Lower scaling ceiling than SJW alone, but essential for SJW's full potential. Deals more damage to enemies >40% HP.                                                                           | Infinite mode, raids, SJW synergy, base defense       |
| **Ichuga (Vasto Lorde)** | Secret   | Massive bleed DPS, strong self-sustain, tankiness | Gets outscaled in extended modes compared to SJW. Three-placement secret, can be pricey.                                                                                                   | Legend stages, general DPS, survivability             |
| **Kilawa (Godspeed)**  | Mythic   | Super fast attacks, teleports, stuns, high DPS   | Lower base damage before buffs stack, can be hard to position initially. Easy to evolve with essence stones.                                                                                 | Legend stages, fast clears, crowd control             |

<Callout type="warning" title="Secret Unit Acquisition">
Paradox and Secret units like Storrk and Zid are exceptionally rare. While powerful, don't feel discouraged if you don't acquire them immediately. Many Mythic units can still carry you through most content in Anime Paradox.
</Callout>
</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="A-Tier & B-Tier DPS Units: Reliable Powerhouses">
A-Tier and B-Tier units offer strong, reliable damage and utility, often excelling in specific situations or providing excellent value for their rarity. They are solid choices for filling out your team and can often be easier to obtain or evolve than their S-Tier counterparts.

### Mid-Tier DPS Unit Overview

<Callout type="info" title="Broly's Infinite Potential">
**Broly** stands out as the best Mythic unit due to his **Legendary Rage** passive, allowing him to gain infinite damage stacks. This makes him exceptionally powerful in Raid and Infinite modes, where his damage can surpass even some Secret units if managed correctly.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Secure Your Farm Unit">

  <Step num="2" title="Acquire a Strong Starter DPS">

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Advanced Strategies & Meta Tips for 2026">
To truly master Anime Paradox, understanding advanced strategies and leveraging unit synergies is paramount. This section provides tips to further optimize your gameplay beyond the basic **anime paradox unit ranking**.

### Optimizing Unit Traits

Traits significantly enhance a unit's performance. For instance, **Vampiric** is highly recommended for tanky units like Cell or Igris to boost their survivability. For DPS units, traits that increase damage, attack speed, or critical hit chance are generally preferred. Always aim for the best possible trait rolls on your top-tier units.

### Raid & Infinite Mode Specialists

*   **Broly**: His infinite damage stacking makes him a top choice for these long-duration modes. Pair him with a strong support to keep him alive while he ramps up.
*   **Sun Jin Wu & Igrus**: This duo is practically unbeatable in Infinite mode. Sun Jin Wu's scaling combined with Igrus's damage and defensive capabilities creates an unstoppable force.
*   **Storrk & Zid**: Their map-wide AOE and immense raw damage output make them excellent for clearing waves quickly in any mode, especially when facing large groups of enemies.

### Economy Management

While Bulma is crucial, don't neglect other sources of income. Efficiently clearing waves, completing challenges, and participating in Infinite mode runs (resetting on Wave 6 for 50 gems) are vital for accumulating gems and gold to further expand your roster and upgrade your units.

<Callout type="tip" title="Synergy is Key">
Always consider how your units work together. A powerful DPS unit can become even stronger with the right support buffs, while a tanky defender can protect your base from overwhelming numbers. Building a cohesive team that leverages synergies will always outperform a collection of individually strong units.
</Callout>
